query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.status, o.paymentStatus, o.paymentMethod, o.razorpayOrderId, o.razorpayPaymentId, o.total, o.orderType, o.createdAt, u.name as customerName, u.email as customerEmail
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN users u ON o.userId = u.id
WHERE o.orderNumber = '00015'
